calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Tito Torres, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the declarations on file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Mario Moore for Injunctive Relief to abate a public nuisance.
See scanned doc. for details of the Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Continued To Apr-24-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
